records.ety: [Heb. Bābel, the name of the capital of Babylonia; in Genesis associated with the idea of “confusion.”]

defs: The city and tower in the land of Shinar, where the confusion of languages took place.
quotes: Therefore is the name of it called Babel.

defs: Hence: A place or scene of noise and confusion; a confused mixture of sounds, as of voices or languages.
quotes: That babel of strange heathen languages.
The grinding babel of the street
